text: /authorize/approve handler doesn't re-validate redirect_uri against registered client URIs — open redirect + code exfiltration
exchangeAuthorizationCode ignores _redirectUri parameter — OAuth spec noncompliance (RFC 6749 4.1.3)
Auth code exchange and refresh token rotation are raceable — SELECT then UPDATE is not atomic
/register rate limiter explicitly disabled with rateLimit: false — contradicts draft's claim that SDK rate limiting mitigates abuse
/authorize/approve is publicly accessible — full auth bypass (claimed critical)
Default-approve behavior: completeAuthorization runs unless action is exactly 'deny'
CSRF: no CSRF token or Origin check on consent form
Debug logging includes sensitive query parameters in production
Rate limiting on /mcp is global, not per-client/per-IP — one holder can starve all
Timing attack on legacy API key comparison (=== not timing-safe)
Server-side authorization transaction binding needed — redirect_uri re-check alone doesn't bind code_challenge, scopes, resource, state
denyAuthorization path also redirects using caller-supplied redirect_uri — needs same validation
